creator: gbell72@rogers.com
text:
Trying to build cyrus-sasl2 results in the following error:

===>  Building for cyrus-sasl-2.1.22
make  all-recursive
Making all in include
Making all in sasldb
ar cru .libs/libsasldb.a db_ndbm.o allockey.o
Making all in plugins
/bin/sh /usr/local/bin/libtool --mode=link cc  -Wall -W -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=opteron  -module -export-dynamic -rpath /usr/local/lib/sasl2 -rpath=/usr/lib:/usr/local/lib -o libsasldb.la  -version-info 2:22:0 sasldb.lo sasldb_init.lo plugin_common.lo ../sasldb/libsasldb.la   
cc -shared  .libs/sasldb.o .libs/sasldb_init.o .libs/plugin_common.o -Wl,--whole-archive ../sasldb/.libs/libsasldb.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive   -march=opteron -Wl,-soname -Wl,libsasldb.so.2 -o .libs/libsasldb.so.2
/usr/bin/ld: ../sasldb/.libs/libsasldb.a(db_ndbm.o): relocation R_X86_64_32 can not be used when making a shared object; recompile with -fPIC
./sasldb/.libs/libsasldb.a(db_ndbm.o): could not read symbols: Bad value
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/local/ports/security/cyrus-sasl2/work/cyrus-sasl-2.1.22/plugins.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/local/ports/security/cyrus-sasl2/work/cyrus-sasl-2.1.22.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/local/ports/security/cyrus-sasl2/work/cyrus-sasl-2.1.22.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/local/ports/security/cyrus-sasl2.
